description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a predominantly black finish and metallic accents. It is equipped with a collapsible stock at the rear, a vertical foregrip beneath the barrel, and a detachable box magazine. The upper receiver displays metallic piping and a robust, industrial look, while the barrel is short and fitted with a muzzle brake. The sighting system appears to be a set of iron sights mounted along the top rail. The overall build suggests a modern, urban combat firearm optimized for maneuverability and control.
description: A compact, black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, short barrel with muzzle brake, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, detachable magazine, and metallic piping on the upper receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle brake, barrel opening, and alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with clearer visibility of the magazine and foregrip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, rear sight, and the back of the receiver.
